candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; best semantic match for total revenue/sales.
Also appears to be the top revenue line and matches Total revenues numerically in preview; useful as fallback if label varies by year.
Revenue-related but not total top-line; appears supplemental and mostly empty.

variables.notes: Using revenue labels as a priority list, not to be summed. 'Total revenues' is preferred; 'OPERATING REVENUES AND OTHER INCOME' is a strong fallback because it matches numerically.

candidates.why: Direct production/input cost line on the income statement; best match for COGS/cost of sales.
Inventory asset account on the balance sheet, not an expense line; not appropriate for COGS.

variables.notes: Selected the income statement direct cost line.

candidates.why: Operating overhead bucket and strong SG&A component candidate, though somewhat broad.
Explicit SG&A line; preferred SG&A concept even though preview is populated only in some years.
Dedicated R&D line exists but appears below EBIT/supplemental; should not be included in SG&A per placement rule.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Expense - Government Grants - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental grant-related item, not core SG&A expense.
Could be SG&A-related if populated, but preview shows no values and no indication it is a primary overhead bucket.
Balance sheet asset, not income statement SG&A expense.
Balance sheet contra-asset, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A exists, but appears mostly empty in preview for recent years, so included it plus 'Other operating expenses' per rule to improve year coverage. Excluded totals, D&A, impairment, and R&D supplemental rows.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: R&D-related wording, but this is amortization rather than current-period R&D expense.
Dedicated R&D expense line; best conceptual match even though shown in supplemental section and preview is empty.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Expense - Government Grants - Supplemental
candidates.why: Grant-related supplemental item, not the core gross R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization of capitalized R&D, not core R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset amount, not P&L R&D expense.
Balance sheet accumulated amortization, not P&L R&D expense.

variables.notes: Mapped XRD to the dedicated R&D expense line. Did not add it to XSGA because the only dedicated R&D line appears below EBIT/in supplemental disclosure, and the rule says not to include such below-EBIT R&D rows in XSGA.

candidates.why: Direct interest line for the latest year; appropriate fallback where gross components are unavailable.
Recurring financing cost component for lease liabilities.
Broad finance-cost total that includes more than interest; less preferred than granular interest lines.
Core interest expense line; strong recurring financing cost component.
Finance-related, but may include non-interest items; less clean for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring lease-interest component; strong match.
Unclear and broad finance line; weak match.
Not interest expense.
Not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of lease-interest concept; less preferred than primary statement line.
Debt balance, not expense.
Debt balance, not expense.
Equity, not interest expense.
Equity, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Selected recurring interest-cost rows and avoided broad finance totals to reduce contamination from FX/fair-value items. 'Net Interest Expense' covers the latest year where granular lines are absent; 'Interest Expenses' and lease-interest rows cover other years. Potential overlap between lease-interest labels is mitigated because they appear in different year sets in the preview.

candidates.row_label: Equity holders of AKVA group ASA
candidates.why: Income attribution line, not balance sheet equity.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Owners of Parent Company - Total
candidates.why: Income statement OCI total, not book equity.

candidates.row_label: Earnings per share equity holders of AKVA group ASA
candidates.why: EPS metric, not equity.

candidates.row_label: Diluted earnings per share equity holders of AKVA group ASA
candidates.why: EPS metric, not equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to equity holders of AKVA group ASA
candidates.why: Direct parent/shareholder equity line on the balance sheet; preferred because it excludes non-controlling interests.
Equity component only, not total book equity.
Equity component only, not total book equity.
Total equity includes non-controlling interests, so less preferred when owner equity is available.
Total assets/liabilities+equity, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to equity holders of AKVA group ASA

variables.notes: Preferred parent-attributable equity to avoid double counting with MIB. Although the label appears multiple times in the preview, the exact same row label is sufficient as the selected mapping.

candidates.why: Income allocation line, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income allocation line, not balance sheet minority equity.
Direct balance sheet NCI line; best match for minority interest.
Direct balance sheet minority interest line; strong fallback if label varies by year.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Not minority equity.

variables.notes: Using balance sheet NCI labels as a priority list, not to be summed. These appear to be alternative labels for the same concept across periods.
